title: EvaluateOffersResponse
description: Response payload returned by the Offer Evaluation Agent after evaluating supplier offers for a procurement request.

request_id.description: Unique identifier of the procurement request that was evaluated.

decision.description: Structured decision produced by the evaluation agent.

examples: Supplier B was selected because it provides the lowest eligible cost and meets the required delivery date.
No supplier offer was selected because every offer was excluded by the evaluation policy.

SelectedOfferDecision.description: Decision used when one valid supplier offer is selected.

status.description: Decision status indicating that a valid offer was selected.

NoValidOffersDecision.description: Decision used when no supplier offer remains valid after policy exclusions.

status.description: Decision status indicating that no offer could be selected.

reasons.description: Policy exclusion reasons that explain why no offer was selected.
examples: All offers have delivery dates later than the requested delivery date.
Some offers use a currency different from the request currency.

SelectedOffer.description: Complete details of the supplier offer selected by the evaluation agent.

offer_id.description: Unique identifier of the selected supplier offer.

supplier_id.description: Unique identifier of the selected supplier.

supplier_name.description: Human-readable name of the selected supplier.

price.description: Total price of the selected offer for the requested quantity.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code of the selected offer price.

delivery_date.description: Committed delivery date of the selected offer, expressed as an ISO 8601 date.

quality_score.description: Quality score of the selected offer on a 0 to 100 scale.

reliability_score.description: Reliability score of the selected supplier on a 0 to 100 scale.

valid_until.description: Date until which the selected supplier offer remains valid, expressed as an ISO 8601 date.

examples.explanation: Supplier B was selected because it provides the lowest eligible cost and meets the required delivery date.

reasons: All offers were excluded because their delivery dates are later than the requested delivery date.

examples.explanation: No supplier offer was selected because every offer was excluded by the evaluation policy.
